title: Navy SEAL Swim Training: 8 Essential Skills
excerpt: Master the 8 categories of swim training you need before heading to Coronado: treading, drown proofing, CSS, fins, open water, lifesaving, breath holding, and knots.

title: Crushing the SWIM Portion of the Navy SEAL PST
excerpt: Everything you need to know to dominate the 450m/500yd swim portion of the Physical Screening Test.

title: Training and Preparation for Open Water
excerpt: Most swimming at BUD/S happens in the 63-degree ocean. Learn how to swim straight, sight properly, and prepare for 2-mile ocean swims.

title: How to Buddy Tow
excerpt: Master the lifesaving technique every SEAL must know. Learn proper towing technique and lifesaving procedures.
